role_title: Investment Banking Analyst — Technology, Media & Telecom (TMT)

bullet_changes.original_text: Wrote 2 initiation reports (15–20 pages each) with buy/hold/sell recommendations; one idea adopted by the portfolio manager
bullet_changes.revised_text: Authored two comprehensive initiation reports using Bloomberg Terminal and CapIQ data, incorporating GAAP financials and TMT industry trends to inform buy/hold/sell recommendations.

bullet_changes.original_text: Modeled revenue and cost drivers for 8 consumer staples companies using 10-K/Q filings and earnings transcripts
bullet_changes.revised_text: Modeled revenue and cost drivers for eight consumer staples companies using Excel, Python, and 10-K/Q filings, applying VBA scripts to analyze earnings transcripts and identify key TMT sector trends.

bullet_changes.original_text: Maintained a coverage universe tracker updated weekly with price targets, consensus estimates, and earnings dates
bullet_changes.revised_text: Maintained a weekly coverage universe tracker in Excel, updating price targets, consensus estimates, and earnings dates for TMT sector companies, leveraging Bloomberg Terminal and CapIQ data to inform investment decisions.

bullet_changes.original_text: Conducted comparable company analysis and precedent transaction analysis using CapIQ and Bloomberg
bullet_changes.revised_text: Conducted comparable company analysis and precedent transaction analysis using CapIQ and Bloomberg Terminal, applying GAAP financials and M&A transaction data to identify key trends and insights in the TMT sector.

bullet_changes.original_text: Built 3-statement financial models and DCF valuations for 4 M&A transactions in the industrials sector (deal sizes $80M–$350M)
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed 3-statement financial models and DCF valuations for four M&A transactions in the industrials sector, utilizing Excel, VBA, and Python to analyze deal sizes and apply TMT sector valuation methodologies.

bullet_changes.original_text: Supported due diligence on a $200M acquisition: reviewed data room documents, flagged 3 material risks to senior bankers
bullet_changes.revised_text: Supported due diligence on a $200M acquisition, reviewing data room documents in PowerPoint and flagging material risks to senior bankers, applying knowledge of GAAP financials and TMT industry trends to inform the M&A process.

bullet_changes.original_text: Prepared materials for board of directors' quarterly financial review
bullet_changes.revised_text: Prepared quarterly financial review materials for the board of directors, creating PowerPoint presentations and Excel dashboards that incorporated Bloomberg Terminal and CapIQ data to provide insights on TMT sector performance and M&A activity.

bullet_changes.original_text: Built an Excel dashboard that automated fleet cost reporting, reducing manual effort from 5 hours to 30 minutes per month
bullet_changes.revised_text: Designed an Excel dashboard that automated fleet cost reporting, reducing manual effort by 80% and applying VBA scripts to analyze cost trends, with potential applications in TMT sector companies with significant fleet operations.

bullet_changes.original_text: Assisted FP&A team with monthly variance analysis; reconciled actuals vs. budget across 6 cost centers
bullet_changes.revised_text: Assisted the FP&A team with monthly variance analysis, reconciling actuals vs. budget across six cost centers using Excel and applying GAAP financials and TMT industry trends to identify areas for cost optimization and M&A opportunities.

bullet_changes.original_text: Built 3-statement financial models and DCF valuations for 4 M&A transactions in the industrials sector (deal sizes $80M–$350M)
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed 3-statement financial models and DCF valuations for 4 industrials sector M&A transactions, with deal sizes ranging from $80M to $350M.

bullet_changes.original_text: Prepared pitch books and CIM drafts for 2 live sell-side mandates; presented to Managing Director for review
bullet_changes.revised_text: Created pitch books and CIM drafts for 2 live sell-side mandates, and presented them to the Managing Director for review.

bullet_changes.original_text: Conducted comparable company analysis and precedent transaction analysis using CapIQ and Bloomberg
bullet_changes.revised_text: Conducted comprehensive comparable company analysis and precedent transaction analysis using CapIQ and Bloomberg Terminal.

bullet_changes.original_text: Modeled revenue and cost drivers for 8 consumer staples companies using 10-K/Q filings and earnings transcripts
bullet_changes.revised_text: Modeled revenue and cost drivers for 8 consumer staples companies using 10-K/Q filings and earnings transcripts, leveraging financial data analysis.

bullet_changes.original_text: Wrote 2 initiation reports (15–20 pages each) with buy/hold/sell recommendations; one idea adopted by the portfolio manager
bullet_changes.revised_text: Authored 2 comprehensive initiation reports (15–20 pages each) with buy/hold/sell recommendations, one of which was adopted by the portfolio manager.

bullet_changes.original_text: Maintained a coverage universe tracker updated weekly with price targets, consensus estimates, and earnings dates
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed and maintained a coverage universe tracker updated weekly with price targets, consensus estimates, and earnings dates.
